The diagram illustrates the project schedule from Winter 2011-12 to 2013-2014. It features a horizontal timeline with vertical dashed lines marking each phase.

Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, this is a 'new' decision per the rule: the observation already resolves to that canonical record and no linking to a different record is needed.

proposed_relations.description: Bus bulbs at SBS stations on Webster Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs extend the sidewalk out to the bus lane at SBS stations, creating additional space for bus riders and pedestrians
1. Bus Bulbs: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

rationale: The Fall 2012 Webster Avenue SBS Newsletter describes bus bulbs explicitly as part of the proposed SBS station design for Webster Avenue. Block p001_c0008 sits under the heading 'Proposed Design for SBS on Webster Avenue' and block p002_c0009 sits under 'Preliminary Design of SBS Stations,' directly linking bus bulbs to the Webster Avenue SBS project.
